ModMetaData.name: RimRimModelEditor
ModMetaData.author: D4egon
ModMetaData.description:
This is the beginning of... A powerful in-game model/texture editor for modding. I often found myself wondering how an item would look if placed slightly different, or what motes or flecks look like if they have different settings.
This mod does that - live. You can literally edit any texture while in the game in this "IDE". And you can export the settings as XML.
along with a whole lot of other things, some work and some dont. That's why I call it ALPHA.
Any and all feedback is more than welcome. I hope this to be a tribute to the amazing workshop community and the RimWorld community.
We have had so much fun over the years.
Full list of current features is available in the readme.md and on the steam workshop page.
